g.text: Malpais cube materialize — the download pipeline
GDB labels + Planetary Computer Sentinel-2 → rslearn windows. $0 on the laptop, then ~150 MB copied to the GPU box.
ingest — download S2 COGs → tile store
THE BIG DOWNLOAD — 12 monthly mosaics × 12 bands
materialize — clip tile store → per-window GeoTIFFs
(never trust materialize's exit code — it 0s on failure)
• COGs stream only the Malpais bbox pixels via HTTP range reads — not the whole ~110 km scenes (that's why it's minutes, not hours).
• --workers 8: ingest is I/O-bound (many independent COG reads), so parallel workers saturate the available bandwidth.
• TMPDIR / CPL_TMPDIR / GDAL_CACHEMAX redirected to the external drive (.tmp) — keeps the ~11 GB tile store off the boot disk (the Phase-0 trap).
